string: AVA Softphone needs microphone access to make and receive voice calls.
AVA Softphone reads your contacts so you can dial them faster and see caller names.
AVA Softphone uses speech recognition to power AI transcription of your call recordings.
AVA Softphone uses notifications to alert you about incoming calls, missed calls and voicemails.
AVA Softphone uses your local network to register with your SIP server for voice calls.
Use Face ID to quickly and securely unlock AVA Softphone.
